use_cases: Full-screen landing hero with interactive 3D gravitational mesh background responding to mouse movement
Cinematic brand presentation pages with character-by-character text reveal animation
Product launch pages featuring immersive dark-themed 3D visuals
Agency or portfolio landing pages requiring dramatic visual impact
ai_summary: A dramatic 3D gravitational mesh hero component featuring a Three.js-powered animated mesh background that responds to mouse movement, with character-by-character text reveal animations and dark/gradient visual styling. Supports both light and dark modes, creating a cinematic atmosphere ideal for SaaS landing pages, brand presentations, or creative portfolios.
